hero.subtitle: One of Mumbai's most revered Hindu temples. Experience wealth, good fortune, and prosperity with the blessings of Goddess Mahalakshmi.

aarti.subtitle: Join us in the divine aarti ceremonies and seek the blessings of the Goddess.

welcome.main_title: Welcome to the Abode of Goddess Mahalakshmi
welcome.main_subtitle: A sacred pilgrimage in the heart of Mumbai
welcome.section_title: Temple of Divine Grace & Rich Spiritual Heritage
welcome.desc: Shri Mahalakshmi Temple is majestically situated on Bhulabhai Desai Road in Mahalaxmi, Mumbai. This revered temple is dedicated to Goddess Mahalakshmi, who is the principal deity along with Goddess Mahakali and Goddess Mahasaraswati.

features.heritage_desc: The cornerstone of Mumbai's spiritual life since 1831.
features.devotion_desc: Experience prosperity with the blessings of Goddess Mahalakshmi.
features.trust_desc: Working for the convenience of devotees and charitable causes.

donation.title: Online Donation
donation.subtitle: Your contribution will be used for charitable causes.
donation.pan_warning: PAN card is mandatory for 80G certificate
donation.name: Full Name
donation.receipt_desc: Your divine contribution has been received.

instructions.title: Important Instructions
instructions.point1: No refund will be given after the amount is credited to the Temple Trust account.
instructions.point2: Devotees should complain to the concerned bank for failed transactions.
instructions.point3: All rights are reserved with the Temple Trust.
instructions.point4: PAN card number is mandatory for 80G certificate.
instructions.point5: Temple is not responsible for any wrong information or failed transactions.

donations.title: Support the Temple
donations.subtitle: Your contribution helps us maintain the sacred temple and support our charitable initiatives.

contact.subtitle: If you have any queries or problems, you can contact us using the information below. We are here to help you.
contact.feedback_desc: You can send us your valuable feedback or suggestions. This will help us improve our services for devotees.
contact.other_info_desc: For more information regarding various religious rituals, pooja bookings and online donations, please contact our office.

footer.about_desc: One of Mumbai's most revered Hindu temples. Experience wealth, good fortune, and prosperity with the blessings of Goddess Mahalakshmi.

footer.80g_desc: Donations are exempt under section 80G of Income Tax Act.

impact.quote: “Every donation given with faith is a strong foundation for the preservation of our culture.”

about.title: About Us
about.subtitle: About the Trust
about.msg_para1: This pride of a virtuous and sattvic state of mind, with the grace and blessings of Shri Mahalakshmi Devi, the acclamations of the devotees, good thoughts, and good actions...
about.msg_para2: On September 22, 1976, the first Board of Trustees of Shri Mahalakshmi Devi Trust started its magnificent journey. This is a journey of devotees' faith, the eternal presence of Shri Mahalakshmi Mata, and a scenic place of joy.
about.msg_para3: Every year 45 to 50 lakh devotees come from all over the world. A holy confluence of pilgrimage and tourism. Our sincere wish is to provide excellent facilities for the devotees. The Trust believes in increasing facilities while maintaining the holiness and significance of the region.
about.works_desc: Renovation of Shri Mahalakshmi Temple, construction of steps, magnificent entrance, meditation hall for devotees, Bhaktangan, Bhaktaniwas, Prasadalaya Annapurna, charitable dispensary, renovation of Shivalaya Lake, drinking water up to the temple area, concretization of internal roads on the hill, provision of three generators for power supply.
about.staff_desc: Efforts to acquire land for expansion of Bhaktaniwas. Proposal to Yavana, positive action. Various action programs and expansion work for beautification of the temple for spiritual joy, creation of educational institutions, peace, nobility, and holiness of the region.
about.donor_remembrance: The contribution of various generous donors of the Trust is remembered. The names of the donors are a mark of respect and manifestation of their generosity. Government cooperation, decisions, and the support of government agencies are remarkable. The staff is working promptly to keep the daily operations of the Trust smooth.

names.bhave: Ma. Dr. Shri Prakash A. Bhave

festival.diwali_desc: Worship Goddess Lakshmi for wealth and prosperity on Amavasya night.
festival.mahalaxmi_desc: An auspicious day for new beginnings and seeking blessings for unending prosperity.
